# indicator

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN тАФ do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata toolbar sustain-pedal indicator: a cross-lens 'Ped.' chip that glows while the pedal is engaged during playback.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SonataToolbar.End` "pedal-indicator" тЖТ `PedalIndicator`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/shell.SonataToolbar`, `apps/sonata/shell.useCursorSelector`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`, `primitives/css/toggle-chip.ToggleChip`
